description: You are a structural steel detailer creating an LOD 400 fabrication model. Model a detailed structural steel connection assembly in an IFC4 project. The assembly must include at least one IfcColumn and one IfcBeam, a flat steel plate classified as IfcPlate at the connection joint, and a bolt pattern of at least four individual bolts classified as IfcFastener. Assign a material with 'Steel' in its name to the connection elements (at least the plate and fasteners). Save the completed model to /home/ga/BIMProjects/steel_connection.ifc.
